name: art-show-qr-codes
description: Generate QR codes and booth displays for artists

scripts.db:update-schema: pg_dump "$DATABASE_URL" --schema-only > migrations/schema/schema.sql && node -e "const v = require('./migrations/schema/version.json'); v.lastUpdated = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; require('fs').writeFileSync('./migrations/schema/version.json', JSON.stringify(v, null, 2));"
